candidates.snippet: En Jp Fonts Non-fonts Blog Profile Name: Équivoque Type: Retail typeface Publisher: Tabular Type Foundry Release year: 2021 Purchase links: I Love Typography Équivoque is a monospaced Latin sans serif for display use. I
This typeface does not contain the traditional diacritic shapes. If you want them, there are countless other choices. © 2026 Toshi Omagari Facebook Twitter EN Twitter JP Instagram GitHub
